channel.title: Copley Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family History

item.title: RQ-M5-PHASE-2-FINDINGS
item.description: RQ-M5 Research: Phase 2 Findings Search Kinawley Parish, County Fermanagh Date: April 23, 2026 Researcher: Claude Code Question: Was Ann Munday actually Ann Murray? Critical Documentary Findings 1.

item.title: Mermaid Diagram Usage Guide
item.description: Mermaid Diagram Usage Guide for AI Agents This guide helps AI agents add high-quality Mermaid diagrams to genealogical research pages.

item.title: Murray Settlement Research Roadmap
item.description: Murray Settlement Research Roadmap A comprehensive strategic guide to answering the eight formal research questions (RQ-M1 through RQ-M8) that will either confirm or refute Tom Copley’s hypothesis that the Irish Settlement in Lewis County, WV was a coordinated community transplant from Roscommon.

item.title: Week 1 Research Instructions
item.description: Week 1 Research Instructions: RQ-M1, RQ-M2, RQ-M3 Use these step-by-step guides to execute the three high-priority research questions.

item.title: Agent Handoff — Phase 2J
item.description: Phase 2J Handoff: Tom’s Timeline Feedback; Iowa Copley Connection Discovered Overview Tom Copley provided two major contributions in Phase 2J: Timeline feedback — Detailed corrections and clarifications about geographic relationships, genealogical facts, and spelling Iowa discovery — Identified Mary...

item.title: Agent Handoff — Phase 2L
item.description: Phase 2L Handoff: Murray Settlement Research; Iowa Discovery; Tom’s Corrections Overview Three major work streams completed in this session (Phases 2J–2L): Tom’s corrections (Phase 2J) — Geographic clarifications, spelling fix (Termon Beg), genealogical facts about William/Bennett and the recusant T...

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Copley Family Research — Changelog A running record of significant additions, corrections, and improvements to this wiki.
